dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The fluorescent lights of Class 2-3 hummed, a monotonous drone that perfectly matched the rhythm of my 'worthless' existence.

dialogue.speaker: KIM MIN-WOO
dialogue.line: (thought) Another day. Another performance. It’s exhausting, but necessary.

dialogue.speaker: LEE JIN-HO
dialogue.line: Look who it is. Our resident punching bag, Kim Min-woo.

dialogue.speaker: PARK SUNG-MIN
dialogue.line: Still got that pathetic look on your face, Min-woo? It's almost lunchtime, you know. Someone's gotta pay for our snacks.

dialogue.speaker: KIM MIN-WOO
dialogue.line: (thought) Here we go. Cue the 'helpless victim' act.

dialogue.speaker: KIM MIN-WOO
dialogue.line: Ah... Jin-ho... Sung-min... I... I don't have much today.

dialogue.speaker: CHOI HYUN-WOO
dialogue.line: Don't have much? What, did your allowance get cut because you're such a loser?

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: SHOVE!

dialogue.speaker: KIM MIN-WOO
dialogue.line: Ugh!

dialogue.speaker: KIM MIN-WOO
dialogue.line: (thought) That push was weak. They're getting complacent. Good.

dialogue.speaker: LEE JIN-HO
dialogue.line: Empty your pockets, Min-woo. Unless you want to spend your lunch break in the infirmary.

dialogue.speaker: KIM MIN-WOO
dialogue.line: Okay... okay... here.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CRUMBLE

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: I pulled out a crumpled 5,000 won bill and a few coins, offering it with a trembling hand. The perfect picture of a terrified student.

dialogue.speaker: PARK SUNG-MIN
dialogue.line: Is this all? Seriously? You're even worthless at earning money.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: GRAB!

dialogue.speaker: LEE JIN-HO
dialogue.line: Whatever. It's better than nothing. Let's go, guys. This loser isn't worth our time.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: FOOTSTEPS FADE

dialogue.speaker: KIM MIN-WOO
dialogue.line: (thought) They always leave just enough for me to buy a cheap bread. They're not completely evil, just typical high school thugs. Ignorant of the beast they're poking.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: I watched them leave, my face a mask of relief. But inside, a different emotion simmered. Not anger, but a cold, calculated patience.

dialogue.speaker: KIM MIN-WOO
dialogue.line: (thought) It's been three months since I enrolled here. Three months of playing the part of Kim Min-woo, the weakest link. The 'worthless person.'

dialogue.speaker: KIM MIN-WOO
dialogue.line: (thought) They think they're strong. They think they're untouchable. They have no idea what true strength looks like.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CLENCH

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: My hand, which had just trembled, now clenched into a fist, the knuckles turning white. The force was enough to crack the desk if I allowed it.

dialogue.speaker: KIM MIN-WOO
dialogue.line: (thought) The goal is simple: survive this school year unnoticed. No fights, no heroics, no revealing my true capabilities. Just blend in, graduate, and disappear.

dialogue.speaker: KIM MIN-WOO
dialogue.line: (thought) But even a 'worthless person' has limits. And I can feel them being tested, day by day.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: BELL RING!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The lunch bell rang, pulling me back to the present. Time to go buy that cheap bread. And keep the act going.

summary: Kim Min-woo, a seemingly weak student, endures daily bullying from Lee Jin-ho and his gang, meticulously maintaining his 'worthless' persona while secretly harboring immense strength and a hidden agenda.
